sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_ripemd (id UInt32, input_string String, hash_value FixedString(20)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_ripemd (id, input_string, hash_value) VALUES (1, 'The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog', RIPEMD160('The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog'));
UPDATE test_ripemd SET hash_value = RIPEMD160(input_string) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, input_string, HEX(hash_value) AS hex_hash FROM test_ripemd WHERE id = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_ripemd WHERE hex_hash = HEX(RIPEMD160('The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog'));
